description: Socrata is Tyler Technologies’ data publishing and open-data platform used by governments and organizations to host, query, and publish datasets. Its platform serves public data portals and publisher workflows across tenant-specific Socrata-hosted domains.
summary: Socrata exposes tenant-hosted HTTP APIs on socrata-powered data portals: the SODA/Open Data API, authenticated with either an application token or Basic auth using a user account or API key/secret pair. No GraphQL API, MCP server, Socrata-domain CLI, or public OpenAPI spec was found.
